scripts.build: bun run build:client && bun run build:server
scripts.docker:up: podman compose up -d && echo "🚀 App running at: http://$(curl -s ifconfig.me || echo 'localhost'):8080"
scripts.deploy: bun run build && podman compose up -d --build && echo "🚀 App running at: http://$(curl -s ifconfig.me || echo 'localhost'):8080"
scripts.deploy:docker: bun run build && docker compose up -d --build && echo "🚀 App running at: http://$(curl -s ifconfig.me || echo 'localhost'):8080"
